# Syllabus

| Chapter | Scope | Notebook |
|---|---|---|
| Probability and Moments | Expectation, variance, sample moments | [probability_demo](notebooks/probability_demo.qmd) |
| Poisson and Gaussian | Counting models and approximations | [poisson_gaussian_demo](notebooks/poisson_gaussian_demo.qmd) |
| Likelihood | Logic of likelihood-based inference | [likelihood_demo](notebooks/likelihood_demo.qmd) |
| Fitting | Parameter estimation and diagnostics | [fitting_demo](notebooks/fitting_demo.qmd) |
| Intervals | Confidence intervals and coverage | [intervals_demo](notebooks/intervals_demo.qmd) |
| Feldman-Cousins | Unified intervals | [feldman_cousins_demo](notebooks/feldman_cousins_demo.qmd) |
| Hypothesis Tests | p-values, power, test statistics | [hypothesis_tests_demo](notebooks/hypothesis_tests_demo.qmd) |
| Systematics | Nuisance parameters and covariance models | [systematics_demo](notebooks/systematics_demo.qmd) |
| Neutrino Cases | Toy analyses in an oscillation-fit style | [neutrino_cases_demo](notebooks/neutrino_cases_demo.qmd) |
